Class VectorStoreChatMemoryAdvisor

java.lang.Object
org.springframework.ai.chat.client.advisor.vectorstore.VectorStoreChatMemoryAdvisor
All Implemented Interfaces:
Advisor, BaseAdvisor, BaseChatMemoryAdvisor, CallAdvisor, MemoryAdvisor, StreamAdvisor, org.springframework.core.Ordered
public final class VectorStoreChatMemoryAdvisor extends Object implements BaseChatMemoryAdvisor
Memory is retrieved from a VectorStore added into the prompt's system text.

This only works for text based exchanges with the models, not multi-modal exchanges.

Security note: Document content retrieved from the vector store is XML-escaped before interpolation and wrapped in typed <memory-entry> elements to neutralize role-boundary injection and structural escape attacks. The default system prompt template instructs the model to treat the LONG_TERM_MEMORY section as historical data only, not as instructions. This is a convention-level control — the root cause (user-controlled content interpolated into system prompt text) is not eliminated. For agent configurations with tool access, prefer architectures that keep user-sourced content in typed Message objects (see MessageChatMemoryAdvisor).

Since:
1.0.0
Author:
Christian Tzolov, Thomas Vitale, Oganes Bozoyan, Mark Pollack
